creator: snelius@tsu.ru
text:
Update for net-p2p/transmission-cli
1.51 -> 1.52
And + patch for net-p2p/transmission

Fix: --- Makefile-   2009-04-28 16:17:31.000000000 +0700
+++ Makefile    2009-04-28 16:06:42.000000000 +0700
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=      transmission
-PORTVERSION=   1.51
+PORTVERSION=   1.52
 CATEGORIES=    net-p2p
 MASTER_SITES=  # empty
 DISTFILES=     # empty

Patch attached with submission follows:
